case_title: POON, GRACE vs. CITY PARKING COMPANY et al

docket_entries.description: NOTICE OF TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL JURY TRIAL SET FOR JUN-26-1995 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
L&M TO CONT. JURY TRIAL. GRANTED, GOOD CAUSE FOUND; DEFT. TO PREPARE ORDER & TIME AND PLACE OF TRIAL.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT HEARING SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE SET FOR JUN-19-1995 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 01
ORDER GRANTING MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL DATE.
SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE ASSIGNED TO DEPARTMENT 01
TRIAL OFF CALENDAR, SETTLED.

JUDGMENT WAS REACHED BY STIPULATION. JUDGMENT IS IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF GRACE POON FOR 16,500. EACH DEFENDANT, CITY PARKING CO. AND KELVIN AND MARY YIM SHALL CONTRIBUTE 50% OF THE JUDGMENT AMOUNT. PLAINTIFF, GRACE POON, THROUGH HER ATTORNEY, ROBERT FONG, SHALL DISMISS THIS CASE WITH PREJUDICE AND RELEASE ALL MEDICAL AND PROFESSIONAL LIENS AGAINST DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFF'S ATTORNEY IS TO PREPARE JUDGMENT.

REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $78.00 FOR TRANSACTION (), PAYABLE TO C.S.A.A., WARRANT #00015565, DATED JUN-30-1995
